deepseek.mau: ~130M active users end of 2025 (Business of Apps); ~96.9M MAU as of Apr 2025 (most recent verified figure); 350.8M web visits in Mar 2026 (SimilarWeb). Not officially disclosed by company.
deepseek.market_share: Not disclosed; DeepSeek is a private Chinese company and does not publish market share data. Estimated #4 most popular AI app globally by MAU (Apr 2025). ~5% of MAU from US users.
deepseek.buzz_volume_note: DeepSeek V4 announced internally Apr 9, 2026, targeting late Apr 2026 release with 1T parameters and Apache 2.0 license; DeepSeek-V3.2 'Fast/Expert Mode' UI redesign launched Apr 2, 2026; DeepSeek-V3 has 103K GitHub stars, DeepSeek-R1 has 92K stars
